calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up (No Default Entered)
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Persolve, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Claude Kenny.
Amended default entered against defendant on January 22, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on January 22, 2008.
Order re: waiver of appearance of witness at prove-up hearing filed January 4, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff PERSOLVE, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant CLAUDE KENNY as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,033.20.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,133.99.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $403.00, for a total of $37,370.19.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
